name: aukro-service
description: Aukro Service for Aukro Integration System

scripts.test: ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' ../../shared/clients/order-client.service.spec.ts && ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/executor/executor.service.spec.ts && ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/executor/executor.controller.spec.ts && ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/executor/executor.module.spec.ts && ts-node --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/offers/policy/offer-policy.service.spec.ts && ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/orders/orders.service.spec.ts && ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/offers/offers.service.spec.ts && ts-node --skip-ignore --compiler-options '{"types":["node"]}' src/aukro/workbench/workbench.service.spec.ts
